Name: Percentage of cases where 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' occurs at least once
Metric: Percentage of 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' out of all cases

Name: Frequency of 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' relative to 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation'
Metric: Percentage of 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' out of all 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation'

Name: Percentage of 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' that appear before 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'
Metric: Percentage of 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' out of all 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'

Name: Number of times 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' is repeated within the same case
Metric: Number of 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' activities

Name: Percentage of process variants containing 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' among all variants
Metric: Percentage of 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' out of all cases

Name: Frequency of 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' compared to 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion'
Metric: Percentage of 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' out of all 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion'

Name: Percentage of 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' occurring in cases that eventually reach 'SW-EIC Accept'
Metric: Percentage of 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' out of all 'SW-EIC Accept'

Name: Number of 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' events per case, averaged across all cases
Metric: the average of the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission'

Name: Percentage of 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' that occur after 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation'
Metric: Percentage of 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' out of all 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation'

Name: Frequency of 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' in variants that include revision cycles (e.g., contain 'Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation')
Metric: Percentage of 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' out of all 'Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation'

Name: Percentage of cases where 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' appears and the process duration exceeds the median variant performance time
Metric: Percentage of 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' out of all cases

Name: Ratio of 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' occurrences to total activity executions in the log
Metric: the average of the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission'

Name: Percentage of variants where 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' directly precedes 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'
Metric: Percentage of 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' out of all 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'

Name: Number of cases where 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' occurs more than once and is followed by 'Plagiarism Percent Match Threshold Exceeded'
Metric: the sum of the function base > 1 where base is the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' filtered by the function ma > 0 where ma is the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'Plagiarism Percent Match Threshold Exceeded'

Name: Percentage of 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' events that belong to cases ending in 'Manuscript Export Succeeded' as a final step
Metric: Percentage of 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' out of all 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'
